allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python,python3,pandoc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source; $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { Write-Output "WORD_COM_OK"; $w.Quit\(\) } else { Write-Output "NO_WORD_COM" })
PowerShell(try { $w = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; Write-Host "WORD_OK"; $w.Quit\(\) } catch { Write-Host "WORD_FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell($cmds = @\('python','python3','pandoc','py'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $r = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Host "$c -> $\($r.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "$c -> MISSING" } })
